languages.text: "Элана — мой позывной для войск инквизитора аф Иррамона. Мы сговорились с ним достаточно давно. Мой отец — еретик, и это факт. Если его не остановить, то весь наш род будет уничтожен". {n}В сапфировых радужках Ювенны разгорается искра упрямства.{/n} "Я сделала все, чтобы не допустить этого, и Бог-Император тому свидетель, сделаю еще столько же".

"Elana is my call sign for Inquisitor af Irramon's troops. We have quite the long-standing arrangement. My father is a heretic, and that is a fact. If he is not stopped, our entire bloodline will be destroyed." {n}A spark of stubbornness flares in Juvenna's sapphire irises.{/n} "I have done everything I can to prevent that from happening, and God-Emperor as my witness, I will do just as much again."
languages.original_text: "Элана — мой позывной для войск инквизитора аф Иррамона. Мы сговорились с ним достаточно давно. Мой отец — еретик, и это факт. Если его не остановить, то весь наш род будет уничтожен". {n}В сапфировых радужках Ювенны разгорается искра упрямства.{/n} "Я сделала все, чтобы не допустить этого, и Бог-Император тому свидетель, сделаю еще столько же".

"Elana is my call sign for Inquisitor af Irramon's troops. We have quite the long-standing arrangement. My father is a heretic, and that is a fact. If he is not stopped, our entire bloodline will be destroyed." {n}A spark of stubbornness flares in Juvenna's sapphire irises.{/n} "I have done everything I can to prevent that from happening, and God-Emperor as my witness, I will do just as much again."

"Elana is my call sign for Inquisitor af Irramon's troops. We have quite the long-standing arrangement. My father is a heretic, and that is a fact. If he is not stopped, our entire bloodline will be destroyed." {n}A spark of stubbornness flares in Juvenna's sapphire irises.{/n} "I have done everything I can to prevent that from happening, and God-Emperor as my witness, I will do just as much again."

languages.text: «Elana es mi código para las tropas del Inquisidor af Irramon. Tenemos un acuerdo desde hace tiempo. Mi padre es un hereje; es un hecho. Si no lo detenemos, todo nuestro linaje será destruido». {n}Una chispa de tozudez reluce en los iris del color del zafiro de Juvenna.{/n} «He hecho todo lo que puedo para evitarlo, y pongo al Dios Emperador como testigo de que seguiré haciéndolo».
languages.original_text: "Elana is my call sign for Inquisitor af Irramon's troops. We have quite the long-standing arrangement. My father is a heretic, and that is a fact. If he is not stopped, our entire bloodline will be destroyed." {n}A spark of stubbornness flares in Juvenna's sapphire irises.{/n} "I have done everything I can to prevent that from happening, and God-Emperor as my witness, I will do just as much again."

traits.locale_text: «Elana es mi código para las tropas del Inquisidor af Irramon. Tenemos un acuerdo desde hace tiempo. Mi padre es un hereje; es un hecho. Si no lo detenemos, todo nuestro linaje será destruido». {n}Una chispa de tozudez reluce en los iris del color del zafiro de Juvenna.{/n} «He hecho todo lo que puedo para evitarlo, y pongo al Dios Emperador como testigo de que seguiré haciéndolo».

languages.text: “埃拉娜是我与阿夫·伊拉蒙审判官部队联络时用的代号。我们之间的合作由来已久。我父亲是个异端，这是事实。如果不阻止他，我们整个血脉都会被毁掉。”{n}尤文娜湛蓝的眼中闪过一丝倔强。{/n}“我已经尽了一切努力去阻止这一切，以神皇之名起誓，今后我还是会这么做。”
languages.original_text: "Elana is my call sign for Inquisitor af Irramon's troops. We have quite the long-standing arrangement. My father is a heretic, and that is a fact. If he is not stopped, our entire bloodline will be destroyed." {n}A spark of stubbornness flares in Juvenna's sapphire irises.{/n} "I have done everything I can to prevent that from happening, and God-Emperor as my witness, I will do just as much again."

traits.locale_text: “埃拉娜是我与阿夫·伊拉蒙审判官部队联络时用的代号。我们之间的合作由来已久。我父亲是个异端，这是事实。如果不阻止他，我们整个血脉都会被毁掉。”{n}尤文娜湛蓝的眼中闪过一丝倔强。{/n}“我已经尽了一切努力去阻止这一切，以神皇之名起誓，今后我还是会这么做。”

languages.text: « Elana est mon nom de code pour les troupes de l'inquisiteur af Irramon. Nous avons un arrangement de longue date, lui et moi. Voyez-vous, il se trouve que mon père est un hérétique. Et si on ne l'arrête pas, c'est notre lignée tout entière qui disparaîtra. » {n}Une étincelle d'obstination embrase les iris couleur saphir de Juvenna.{/n} « J'ai remué ciel et terre pour éviter que cela se produise et, l'Empereur-Dieu m'en est témoin, j'en referais autant si cela s'avérait nécessaire. »
languages.original_text: "Elana is my call sign for Inquisitor af Irramon's troops. We have quite the long-standing arrangement. My father is a heretic, and that is a fact. If he is not stopped, our entire bloodline will be destroyed." {n}A spark of stubbornness flares in Juvenna's sapphire irises.{/n} "I have done everything I can to prevent that from happening, and God-Emperor as my witness, I will do just as much again."

Voyez-vous, il se trouve que mon père est un hérétique. Et si on ne l'arrête pas, c'est notre lignée tout entière qui disparaîtra. » {n}Une étincelle d'obstination embrase les iris couleur saphir de Juvenna.{/n} « J'ai remué ciel et terre pour éviter que cela se produise et, l'Empereur-Dieu m'en est témoin, j'en referais autant si cela s'avérait nécessaire. »

languages.text: "Elana, Engizisyoncu af İrramon'un birlikleri için kullandığım kod adıdır. Oldukça uzun süredir devam eden bir anlaşmamız var. Babam bir kâfir ve bu bir gerçek. Eğer durdurulmazsa tüm nesebimiz yok edilecek." {n}Juvenna'nın safir irislerinde bir inatçılık kıvılcımı parlıyor.{/n} "Bunun olmasını engellemek için elimden gelen her şeyi yaptım. Tanrı İmparator şahidim olsun ki bir o kadarını daha yapacağım."
languages.original_text: "Elana is my call sign for Inquisitor af Irramon's troops. We have quite the long-standing arrangement. My father is a heretic, and that is a fact. If he is not stopped, our entire bloodline will be destroyed." {n}A spark of stubbornness flares in Juvenna's sapphire irises.{/n} "I have done everything I can to prevent that from happening, and God-Emperor as my witness, I will do just as much again."

traits.locale_text: "Elana, Engizisyoncu af İrramon'un birlikleri için kullandığım kod adıdır. Oldukça uzun süredir devam eden bir anlaşmamız var. Babam bir kâfir ve bu bir gerçek. Eğer durdurulmazsa tüm nesebimiz yok edilecek." {n}Juvenna'nın safir irislerinde bir inatçılık kıvılcımı parlıyor.{/n} "Bunun olmasını engellemek için elimden gelen her şeyi yaptım. Tanrı İmparator şahidim olsun ki bir o kadarını daha yapacağım."

languages.text: "Elana ist mein Rufzeichen für die Truppen von Inquisitor af Irramon. Wir haben eine eher langfristige Vereinbarung. Mein Vater ist ein Ketzer, das ist eine Tatsache. Wird er nicht aufgehalten, wird unsere gesamte Blutlinie vernichtet." {n}Ein Hauch von Starrköpfigkeit flammt in Juvennas grünen Augen auf.{/n} "Ich habe getan, was ich konnte, um das zu verhindern, und so wahr mir der Gottimperator helfe, werde ich es wieder tun."
languages.original_text: "Elana is my call sign for Inquisitor af Irramon's troops. We have quite the long-standing arrangement. My father is a heretic, and that is a fact. If he is not stopped, our entire bloodline will be destroyed." {n}A spark of stubbornness flares in Juvenna's sapphire irises.{/n} "I have done everything I can to prevent that from happening, and God-Emperor as my witness, I will do just as much again."

traits.locale_text: "Elana ist mein Rufzeichen für die Truppen von Inquisitor af Irramon. Wir haben eine eher langfristige Vereinbarung. Mein Vater ist ein Ketzer, das ist eine Tatsache. Wird er nicht aufgehalten, wird unsere gesamte Blutlinie vernichtet." {n}Ein Hauch von Starrköpfigkeit flammt in Juvennas grünen Augen auf.{/n} "Ich habe getan, was ich konnte, um das zu verhindern, und so wahr mir der Gottimperator helfe, werde ich es wieder tun."

languages.text: 「エラーナは、イラモンの軍隊に対する私の呼び名だ。長い間、我々は協力している。父は異端者であり、それは事実だ。彼が止められなければ、我々の血筋は滅びるだろう。」{n}ジュベナは、青色の瞳に頑固な光を宿す。{/n}「私は、その事態を阻止するために、できる限りを尽くした。そして、神皇帝に証言するが、私はまた同じように尽くす。」
languages.original_text: "Elana is my call sign for Inquisitor af Irramon's troops. We have quite the long-standing arrangement. My father is a heretic, and that is a fact. If he is not stopped, our entire bloodline will be destroyed." {n}A spark of stubbornness flares in Juvenna's sapphire irises.{/n} "I have done everything I can to prevent that from happening, and God-Emperor as my witness, I will do just as much again."
